# FIND(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  find — search for files

## SYNOPSIS
  find [OPTIONS] [ARGS]

## DESCRIPTION
Walk the filesystem tree finding files matching criteria.

## OPTIONS
  -name  match by filename
  -type f  files only
  -type d  directories only
  -size +1k  size filter

## EXAMPLES
  find /home -name '*.sh'
  find / -type f -name 'flag*'
  find /opt -size +10k

## ENVIRONMENT
  Terminal Depths v1.0 — cyberpunk hacking simulation

## SEE ALSO
  help, man, commands
